description_long: This gate is constructed from dark gray stone blocks, forming a robust and ancient-looking archway. The arch is topped with triangular stone spikes, giving it a slightly foreboding appearance. The structure is flanked by thick stone walls on either side, with some blocks protruding for added texture and depth. Green vines and tufts of grass grow along the base and up the sides, suggesting age and a degree of neglect or integration with nature. The central opening is wide and tall, allowing easy passage for people or small vehicles. The overall design is reminiscent of a medieval or fantasy ruin, blending utilitarian function with decorative, overgrown elements.
description: A tall, dark stone archway gate with triangular spikes and overgrown vines, flanked by thick stone walls. The structure appears ancient and weathered, with a wide central opening.
description_view_0: The gate is seen from the side, showing the thickness of the stone walls and the depth of the archway.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the full arch with triangular spikes, decorative vines, and the wide central passage framed by stone walls.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the layered stone construction and the narrow profile of the gate.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the arch and stone walls without the prominent vine decorations, showing a more uniform stone surface.
